heading: Exception relating to importation of goods
label: 2371 Exception relating to importation of goods
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in subsec. (a), was in the original “this division”, meaning div. E of , , , known as the Fentanyl Eradication and Narcotics Deterrence Off Fentanyl or the FEND Off Fentanyl Act, which is classified principally to this chapter. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub. L. 118–50138 Stat. 934section 2341 of this titleApr. 24, 2024

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The authority or a requirement to block and prohibit all transactions in all property and interests in property under this chapter shall not include the authority or a requirement to impose sanctions on the importation of goods.

children.heading: Good defined
children.label: b Good defined
children.text: In this section, the term “good” means any article, natural or manmade substance, material, supply or manufactured product, including inspection and test equipment, and excluding technical data.
